full_text:
Gaotang Long (Shenping) 高棠隆 (升平)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gaotang Long (高棠隆), styledShenping (升平), was born in Taishan. A valued officer, created a calender for Wei, was Tutor to Cao Rui. Gaotang Long was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Gaotang Long lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
